name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that keeps your slides looking human, not generated.
problem: Generic AI presentation tools often produce slides that look templated, robotic, and off-brand, undermining credibility in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by using AI to accelerate slide creation while preserving design quality and intentionality. Teams can move faster without sacrificing the polished, coherent aesthetic that audiences expect.
useCases: Creating investor decks with a refined, non-AI aesthetic
Building client-facing pitch presentations quickly without design resources
Producing internal strategy or roadmap slides at speed
Iterating on presentation content with AI assistance while maintaining brand consistency
